prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等哈工大王牌专业方向持续高热推荐；云南省2026年普通高考总考生约37.79万人，较2025年（约28.57万人）大幅增加约32%，竞争显著加剧；哈工大位于黑龙江哈尔滨，属东北地区，距云南较远，存在一定地域偏好影响；该校在云南招生占比极小（约0.3%），属跨省招生。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次已大幅前移至327名的历史高位、2026年招生计划持平、云南省考生总数大幅增加约32%导致竞争加剧、学校声誉中性偏正面且抖音高热、王牌工科专业热度持续升温等因素，预计2026年位次较2025年略有后移；预测最低位次约357名，区间307–407名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 1654 → 1255 → 2104 → 968 → 327, showing overall drastic fluctuations. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 327 (historical best), with a recent upward trend indicating intensified competition. The enrollment plan for science/physics category in Yunnan Province: 37 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 54 in 2023, 16 in 2024, 11 in 2025; 2026 plan is 11, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 12th (Top 20). Recent rankings: 11th in 2021 → 13th in 2022 → 13th in 2023 → 16th in 2024 → 14th in 2025 → 12th in 2026, showing overall stability with slight improvement. In 2026, reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking: 10th (high heat), with large short video exposure, reflecting high attention from applicants. In 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission threshold (applicants reported a sharp drop), but the ranking significantly recovered in 2025. It has 17 A- or above disciplines, including A+ in Mechanics, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Environmental Science and Engineering, and A in Computer Science and Technology, with top-tier engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other flagship majors of HIT remain highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Yunnan Province is approximately 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (approximately 285,700), sharply intensifying competition. HIT is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang, in the Northeast region, far from Yunnan, with some regional preference influence. Its enrollment proportion in Yunnan is extremely small (about 0.3%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical high ranking of 327 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase of about 32% in total examinees in Yunnan Province leading to intensified competition, the neutral-to-positive school reputation with high Douyin heat, and the continued popularity of flagship engineering majors, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly decline compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 357, with a range of 307–407.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 300), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship class types. In 2026, HIT's Physics Category in Yunnan only enrolls 11 students, all in high-scoring Engineering Experimental Class segments, making competition extremely intense.
